title.ko: 안경; 선글래스 또는 안경과 같은 성질을 가진 보호안경; 콘택트 렌즈
title.en: SPECTACLES; SUNGLASSES OR GOGGLES INSOFAR AS THEY HAVE THE SAME FEATURES AS SPECTACLES; CONTACT LENSES

definition.ko: 광학부품 G02C7/00 비광학부품 지지 부재; 부속품 G02C3/00, G02C5/00; 11/00 광학부품을 비광학부품에 부착 보조물 G02C1/00; 9/00 조립, 수리, 청소 G02C13/00

title.en: Assemblies of lenses with bridges or browbars
Bridge or browbar secured to lenses without the use of rims
Bridge or browbar secured to, or integral with, partial rims, e.g. with partially-flexible rim for holding the lens
Bridge or browbar secured to, or integral with, closed rigid rims for the lenses
the rims being transversely-split and provided with securing means
Special supporting arrangement for lens assemblies or monocles
Arrangements for supporting by headgear
Arrangements for supporting by hand, e.g. lorgnette; Arrangements for supporting by articles
Constructions of non-optical parts
Bridges; Browbars; Intermediate bars (nose-engaging surfaces G02C0005120000)
with adjustable means
with resilient means
foldable
Intermediate bar or bars between bridge and side-members
Nose-pads; Nose-engaging surfaces of bridges or rims
Side-members
resilient or with resilient parts
reinforced
adjustable, e.g. telescopic
Hinges

title.ko: 광학부재(재료에 따라 특징이 있는 것 G02B 1/00)
title.en: Optical parts (characterised by the material G02B0001000000)
Lenses; Lens systems
Contact lenses for the eyes
bifocal; multifocal
Auxiliary lenses; Arrangements for varying focal length
Filters, e.g. for facilitating adaptation of the eyes to the dark; Sunglasses
Polarisers
Mirrors; Prisms
Shades, shields; Obturators, e.g. with pinhole, with slot
Attaching auxiliary optical parts
by hinging
by fitting over or clamping on
Non-optical adjuncts; Attachment thereof (G02C0007160000 takes precedence)
Ornaments, e.g. exchangeable
Illuminating means
Hearing aids  (construction of electric hearing aids H04R0025000000)

title.ko: 서리방지 장치, 예. 환기, 가열; 와이퍼(H05B 3/84가 우선)
title.en: Anti-misting means, e.g. ventilating, heating; Wipers (H05B0003840000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 조립; 수리; 청소(콘택트 렌즈의 소독 또는 살균 A61L 12/00)
title.en: Assembling; Repairing; Cleaning (disinfection or sterilisation of contact lenses A61L0012000000)
